description: Import the calendar file located at `~/Documents/busy_schedule.ics` and configure three new calendar categories: "Internal Sync" (#0000FF), "Client Call" (#008000), and "Personal Time" (#FFA500). Apply these categories to their corresponding events: assign "Internal Sync" to "Q3 Roadmap Review", "Client Call" to "Acme Corp Pitch", and "Personal Time" to "Dentist Appointment".
